mpeg_o.value_range
==================

.. py:module:: mpeg_o.value_range

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   ``ValueRange`` — inclusive numeric interval used for axis bounds.



Classes
-------

.. autoapisummary::

   mpeg_o.value_range.ValueRange


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:class:: ValueRange

   An inclusive numeric interval ``[minimum, maximum]``.

   Immutable value class. Empty or inverted ranges are permitted at
   construction time; consumers decide whether ``minimum > maximum``
   is meaningful in their context.

   :param minimum: Lower bound (inclusive).
   :type minimum: float
   :param maximum: Upper bound (inclusive).
   :type maximum: float

   .. attribute:: span

      Difference ``maximum - minimum``.

      :type: float

   .. rubric:: Notes

   API status: Stable.

   Cross-language equivalents
   --------------------------
   Objective-C: ``MPGOValueRange`` · Java:
   ``com.dtwthalion.mpgo.ValueRange``.


   .. py:attribute:: minimum
      :type:  float


   .. py:attribute:: maximum
      :type:  float


   .. py:method:: contains(value: float) -> bool

      Return ``True`` if ``value`` lies within the closed range.

      :param value:
      :type value: float

      :returns: *bool*



   .. py:property:: span
      :type: float


      Difference between ``maximum`` and ``minimum``.
